title: neomirandea psoralea
intro: Neomirandea psoralea, also known as the desert heliotrope, is a flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions and wounds due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Neomirandea psoralea include promoting wound healing, reducing inflammation, and potentially treating conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is typically prepared through infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
